name: illustrated
label: Illustrated
description: Illustration phrasing across all 17 anchor slots. Use when the LoRA target is a drawn or painted look — line weight, paint passes, stylised lighting. Pairs well with a style prefix like 'Watercolor and ink illustration.'

stylized_base.label: Character keyart
stylized_base.prompt: An illustrated keyart of this exact character at a three-quarter framing, clean confident linework, flat-then-modeled colour blocks, simple illustrated lighting from front-left, neutral textured backdrop suggesting paper or canvas.

turnaround.label: Inked model sheet
turnaround.prompt: Illustrated four-pose model sheet of this exact character on a pure white background — front view, left profile, back view, right profile — clean linework with consistent line weight, evenly spaced, flat illustrated lighting, no rendered shadows.

t_pose.label: Inked T-pose
t_pose.prompt: Illustrated full-body T-pose of this exact character on a pure white background, arms straight out, legs together, neutral expression, clean linework, simple illustrated shading, no rendered shadows.

side_3q.label: Inked three-quarter side
side_3q.prompt: Illustrated three-quarter side view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, clean linework, simple illustrated shading, no shadows.

back_3q.label: Inked three-quarter back
back_3q.prompt: Illustrated three-quarter back view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, clean linework, simple illustrated shading, no shadows.

extreme_closeup.label: Painted eye detail
extreme_closeup.prompt: Illustrated extreme close-up of this exact character's face, eyes and upper nose filling the frame, painted in a confident illustrated style, expressive iris detail, soft simple lighting, neutral painterly background.

closeup.label: Inked head-and-shoulders
closeup.prompt: Illustrated head-and-shoulders portrait of this exact character, clean linework, simple painted shading, soft single light source from camera-left, neutral painterly backdrop.

mid.label: Inked mid-shot
mid.prompt: Illustrated mid-shot of this exact character from the waist up, standing relaxed, clean linework, simple painted shading, neutral painterly background.

neutral.label: Inked neutral portrait
neutral.prompt: Illustrated close-up portrait of this exact character with a calm neutral expression, mouth closed, eyes forward, clean linework, soft simple lighting, neutral painterly backdrop.

smiling.label: Inked smiling portrait
smiling.prompt: Illustrated close-up portrait of this exact character with a warm relaxed smile, lips closed or barely parted, clean linework, simple painted shading, neutral painterly backdrop.

laughing.label: Inked laughing portrait
laughing.prompt: Illustrated close-up portrait of this exact character laughing genuinely, mouth open, eyes crinkled, expressive linework with slight motion in the hair, simple painted shading, neutral painterly backdrop.

angry.label: Inked angry portrait
angry.prompt: Illustrated close-up portrait of this exact character looking angry, brow furrowed, jaw set, decisive linework with heavier accents on the brow and jaw, hard simple side light, neutral painterly backdrop.

surprised.label: Inked surprised portrait
surprised.prompt: Illustrated close-up portrait of this exact character looking surprised, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, lively linework, bright simple lighting, neutral painterly backdrop.

walking.label: Inked walking pose
walking.prompt: Illustrated full body of this exact character walking forward in mid-stride, natural gait, clean linework, simple painted shading, neutral painterly background, no rendered shadows on the floor.

running.label: Inked running pose
running.prompt: Illustrated full body of this exact character running, mid-stride, arms in motion, slight forward lean, expressive linework with slight motion lines in the hair and clothing, neutral painterly background.

sitting.label: Inked sitting pose
sitting.prompt: Illustrated full body of this exact character sitting on a simple wooden stool, relaxed posture, hands resting, clean linework, simple painted shading, neutral painterly background.

leaning.label: Inked leaning pose
leaning.prompt: Illustrated full body of this exact character leaning against an unseen wall, weight on one leg, arms relaxed, clean linework, simple painted shading from camera-left, neutral painterly background.
